scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Berkeley says it selects first-year students through a holistic review that considers weighted and unweighted UC GPA, planned 12th-grade courses, and the full record of achievement in college preparatory courses.
